visual_description: A hooded figure in dark clothing moves across a checkered floor in a dimly lit room, approaching a large ornate mirror. The figure raises a handgun and looks into the mirror, its reflection showing the weapon and tense posture. Bright light from a doorway illuminates the scene as the figure stands in the doorway holding the gun.
